title: More Food
body:
Discover More Food, a tantalizing Minecraft mod that expands your culinary adventures. Indulge in a variety of mouthwatering treats like cupcakes, ice cream, sushi, pizza, bacon, and more. This mod adds endless opportunities* for culinary creativity. Personalize your world, throw epic food parties, and satisfy your virtual cravings. Download More Food" now and embark on a flavorful journey in Minecraft.

*Not quite endless

# Fabric versions require Fabric API

# FAQ

### Will this mod be backported to older versions?
No

### Can I use this mod in a modpack?
Yes, just credit

### Is there a Curseforge version?
Yes: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/foodmodmorefood
